origin.en: West Africa (Sahel region: Mali, Niger, Burkina Faso)
origin.zh: 西非（萨赫勒地区：马里、尼日尔、布基纳法索）

history.en: Ancient sighthound breed developed by nomadic Tuareg peoples of the Sahel region for hunting gazelle and other game, protecting livestock, and serving as companions. Bred for speed and stamina in Saharan and Sahelian conditions
history.zh: 古老的视觉猎犬品种，由萨赫勒地区的游牧图阿雷格人培育，用于狩猎瞪羚等猎物、保护牲畜并作为伴侣犬。为适应撒哈拉和萨赫勒环境，特别注重速度和耐力培育。

overview.en: The Azawakh is an ancient sighthound from the Sahel region of West Africa, bred by the nomadic Tuareg people for hunting gazelle, guarding livestock, and companionship. This breed is known for its elegant, lean silhouette, incredible speed, and endurance in harsh desert climates. Azawakhs are deeply loyal and form strong bonds with their family, but they are naturally aloof and wary of strangers, making them excellent watchdogs. They possess a sensitive, independent spirit and require gentle, respectful handling. While affectionate with trusted humans, they can be reserved and protective. Their high prey drive and strong will mean they are best suited for experienced owners who understand sighthound temperament. Azawakhs thrive on routine, respect, and a calm, confident leader.
overview.zh: 阿扎瓦克犬是一种源自西非萨赫勒地区的古老视觉猎犬，由游牧的图阿雷格人培育，用于猎捕瞪羚、护卫牲畜并作为伴侣犬。该犬种以其优雅纤细的轮廓、惊人的速度和适应严酷沙漠气候的耐力而闻名。阿扎瓦克犬对家庭极其忠诚，但天生对陌生人冷淡警惕，是出色的看门犬。它们敏感独立，需要温和且尊重的对待。尽管对信任的人充满深情，但可能表现出保留和护卫性。其强烈的捕猎本能和固执的个性最适合有视觉猎犬饲养经验的资深主人。阿扎瓦克犬在规律生活、尊重和冷静自信的领导力下会茁壮成长。

care.en: Azawakhs have a short, fine coat that requires minimal grooming—weekly brushing with a soft bristle brush or rubber mitt removes loose hair and keeps the skin healthy. They are clean dogs with little to no doggy odor and only need baths when necessary. Their nails grow quickly and should be trimmed regularly to prevent discomfort. Daily exercise is essential: at least 45-60 minutes of running in a safe, fenced area or long walks, as they need to stretch their legs. They thrive on routine veterinary care, including annual check-ups, vaccinations, and parasite prevention. Due to their low body fat, they are sensitive to cold and need a warm, sheltered sleeping area. Regular ear checks and dental care round out their health maintenance.
care.zh: 阿扎瓦克犬的被毛短而细腻，护理需求极低——每周用软毛刷或橡胶手套梳理一次即可去除死毛并保持皮肤健康。它们体味很轻，几乎无异味，只在必要时才需洗澡。指甲生长较快，应定期修剪以避免不适。每日至少需要45-60分钟的安全围栏区域奔跑或长时间散步，以满足其运动需求。定期兽医检查（包括年度体检、疫苗接种和寄生虫预防）至关重要。由于体脂率低，它们对寒冷敏感，需要温暖避风的睡眠区。定期检查耳朵和进行牙齿护理也是健康管理的重要环节。

training.en: Training an Azawakh requires patience, consistency, and a gentle, reward-based approach. Harsh corrections or force will damage trust and cause resistance. They are intelligent but independent thinkers, so training sessions should be short, varied, and engaging. Early socialization is critical—expose them to different people, environments, and calm dogs from puppyhood to prevent fearfulness or aggression. Positive reinforcement with high-value treats works best. Recall training in a secure area is essential due to their strong prey drive; a long line can be useful. They respond well to calm, confident leadership. Avoid repetitive drills; instead, incorporate games and problem-solving. Obedience classes with a sighthound-experienced trainer can be highly beneficial.
training.zh: 训练阿扎瓦克犬需要耐心、一致性以及温和的奖励式方法。严厉的纠正或强迫会破坏信任并引发抗拒。它们聪明但独立思考，训练时间应简短、多变且有趣。早期社会化至关重要——从幼犬期开始让它们接触不同的人、环境以及平静的犬只，以防胆怯或攻击性。使用高价值零食进行正向强化效果最佳。由于捕猎本能强烈，在安全区域进行召回训练是必须的，可借助长牵引绳。它们对冷静自信的领导反应良好。避免重复枯燥的训练，而是融入游戏和解决问题环节。有视觉猎犬经验的训犬师指导的服从课程会非常有帮助。

diet.en: Azawakhs have a lean, athletic build and a fast metabolism. Feed a high-quality, protein-rich diet suitable for active sighthounds. Because they are prone to bloat (gastric dilatation-volvulus), avoid feeding one large meal daily—instead, split their daily portion into two or three smaller meals. Do not allow vigorous exercise immediately before or after eating. Their diet should include animal-based proteins (chicken, beef, fish, or lamb), healthy fats, and digestible carbohydrates. Monitor their weight closely; they should maintain a visible waistline and ribs easily felt but not seen. Avoid overfeeding, as excess weight stresses their delicate joints. Fresh water must always be available. Consult your vet for portion sizes based on age, activity level, and metabolism.
diet.zh: 阿扎瓦克犬体型精瘦、代谢快，需喂食适合活跃视觉猎犬的高品质高蛋白犬粮。由于易患胃扩张-扭转（胀气），应避免每日只喂一顿大餐，而将日粮分成两到三小份。进食前后一小时内不要进行剧烈运动。饮食应包含动物蛋白（鸡肉、牛肉、鱼肉或羊肉）、健康脂肪和易消化碳水化合物。密切监测体重——应保持明显的腰线，肋骨可轻易触到但不可见。避免过度喂食，因超重会对其纤细的关节造成压力。始终提供新鲜饮水。根据年龄、活动量和代谢水平咨询兽医确定具体喂食量。

livingTips.en: Azawakhs are not ideal for apartment living unless given extensive daily exercise. They thrive in homes with a securely fenced yard where they can sprint. Due to their high prey drive, they should never be off-leash in unenclosed areas. They are sensitive to extreme cold and need indoor living with warm bedding. With proper socialization, they can coexist with older, respectful children, but may be too aloof for very young or boisterous kids. They often do not get along with small pets like cats or rabbits due to their hunting instinct, but may live peacefully with dogs of similar size and temperament if raised together. They are protective of their family and territory, making them excellent watchdogs. Early and ongoing socialization is key to a well-adjusted Azawakh.
livingTips.zh: 除非每天有大量运动，否则阿扎瓦克犬不适合公寓生活。它们最适合在有安全围栏院子的家庭中生活，可以尽情奔跑。由于捕猎本能强烈，绝不能在无围栏区域松开牵引绳。它们对严寒敏感，需要室内生活并配有温暖睡垫。通过充分社会化，它们能与年长且懂礼貌的儿童相处，但对幼小或吵闹的孩子可能过于冷淡。因狩猎天性，它们通常与猫或兔子等小型宠物难以相容，但若从小一起养大，可能与体型和性情相近的犬只和平共处。它们会保护家庭和领地，是优秀的看门犬。持续且早期社会化是培养一只性格稳定的阿扎瓦克犬的关键。
